contract.missionStatement: Add new data panels to the credit, insurance, equities+, real estate, crypto, macro, fx, and derivatives tabs by leveraging existing server endpoints and integrating additional governmental/non-governmental data sources discovered via websearch.

criteria.description: Credit tab has a new panel displaying FDIC data using the existing /api/fdic endpoint.
Insurance tab has a new panel displaying insurance data using the existing /api/insurance endpoint.
Equities+ tab has a new panel displaying institutional ownership data using the existing /api/institutional endpoint.
Real Estate tab has a new panel displaying HUD data using the existing /api/hud endpoint.
Crypto tab has a new panel displaying on-chain metrics using the existing /api/crypto endpoint.
Macro tab has a new panel displaying global economic indicators using the existing /api/globalEconomicIndicators endpoint.
FX tab has a new panel displaying IMF IFS data using the existing /api/imfIfs endpoint.
Derivatives tab has a new panel displaying options flow data using the existing /api/derivatives endpoint.
At least one new governmental data endpoint is discovered via websearch and integrated as a new server route and corresponding panel in one of the specified tabs.
At least one new non-governmental data endpoint is discovered via websearch and integrated as a new server route and corresponding panel in one of the specified tabs.
All new panels are registered in the panel registry and appear in the dashboard configuration.
A Playwright test is added to verify that each new panel renders without errors and displays data or a placeholder.
